---
title: "Various datasets over Tokyo"
---
Some maps I made for an assignment previously.  

Data is from ~late 2024, and are either from [Tokyo Open Data Portal](https://portal.data.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/) or ekidata.jp  

----------  
  
[Zoning Choropleth](https://tokyochizu.github.io/zoning.html)    
My favourite map, showing the structure in the "gradient" of permissible zoning in Tokyo. ([Japans Federalized Zoning PDF](https://www.mlit.go.jp/common/001050453.pdf#page=5))   

----------  

[Disaster Risk Map](https://tokyochizu.github.io/map1.html)  
Map showing disaster risk assessment scores throughout Tokyo  

----------  
  
[Train Stations](https://tokyochizu.github.io/trainstations.html)  
Train Station locations
